zones.zone_name: Rural Zoning District - 190,000 sf per dwelling
zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1 (Intensity Schedule)
zones.notes: Min lot area per dwelling unit 190,000 sf; ordinance states lot area per DU, not dua, so max_density_dua=TBD. Height per footnote (1): no part of principal structure may exceed 24 ft above design grade (Sec. 6.02(1)). Coverage = max lot area under roof. Source reachable via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.zone_name: Rural Zoning District - 70,000 sf per dwelling
zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1
zones.notes: Min lot area per DU 70,000 sf. Height 24 ft (note 1). Coverage = max lot area under roof. Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.zone_name: Rural Zoning District - 1 acre per dwelling
zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1
zones.notes: Min lot area per DU 43,560 sf (1 acre; original 'One (1) Acre'). Height 24 ft (note 1). Coverage = max lot area under roof. Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1
zones.notes: Min lot area per DU 35,000 sf. Height 24 ft (note 1). Coverage = max lot area under roof. Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.notes: Min lot area per DU 18,000 sf. Height 24 ft (note 1). Coverage = max lot area under roof. Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.notes: Min lot area per DU 10,000 sf. Height 24 ft (note 1). Coverage = max lot area under roof. Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1
zones.notes: Min lot area 43,560 sf; min lot area per DU 6,000 sf (lot-area-per-DU, not dua, so max_density_dua=TBD). Height 24 ft (note 1; (1)(G) allows certain roof screen-walls). Coverage = max area under roof. Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1
zones.notes: Height per footnote (2) = 30 ft. Coverage = max area under roof. No min lot area per DU (N/A). Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1
zones.notes: Height per footnote (2) = 30 ft. Coverage = max area under roof. No min lot area per DU (N/A). Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. VI, Sec. 6.01, Table 6.1
zones.notes: Height per footnote (2) = 30 ft. Min lot area 6,000 sf. Side yard min 0, rear yard min 0 per Table 6.1 (footnote (5) on rear). Coverage = max area under roof. Source via American Legal render-doc API.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Ch. 16, Art. V, Sec. 5.03
zones.notes: OS-R is NOT in the Sec. 6.01 Table 6.1 intensity schedule. Per Sec. 5.03, OS-R has no numeric dimensional standards; development requires an approved master open space development plan (Town Council). All dimensional standards TBD. Source via American Legal render-doc API.
